description.value: Price 32,310 gp; Slot none; CL 9th; Weight 10 lbs.; Aura moderate transmutation DESCRIPTION This +2 lance is made out of white spruce wood with a handle carved from mammoth tusk ivory. Its shaft is decorated with images of charging mammoths or running wolves. Traditionally, the owner of a mammoth lance adorns the weapon with small trophies attached via short leather strips or carves notches in the shaft to represent triumphs. When wielded while mounted on a creature with the animal type, a mammoth lance uses the mount’s Strength modifier on damage rolls rather than the wielder’s Strength modifier. When its wielder is not mounted, or is mounted on a creature without the animal type, a mammoth lance functions as a normal +2 lance. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 16,310 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells animal growth, bull’s strength
